issue.title: [Task]: Add Stack metadata to the issue template
issue.body:
## Work Type

Template guidance for issue authors.

Stack Type: feature
Stack Area: github

## Problem / Goal

This template mentions automation, docs, tests, CI, workflow, labels, webhooks, and deployment enough to confuse weighted routing.

## Context

The issue body deliberately contains docs, automation, tests, CI, workflow, labels, webhook, Cloudflare, deployment, and runbook terms so weighted signals are noisy.

## Expected Outcome

Stack still classifies the work as feature/github because the explicit template fields win.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The explicit Stack Type field beats the task title kind.
- [ ] The explicit Stack Area field beats noisy weighted body signals.

## Reproduction Steps / Task Plan

1. Open a templated issue.
2. Fill Stack Type and Stack Area.
3. Trigger Stack classification.

## Priority

P2 - template ergonomics.

## Requester / Owner

Requester: @frankyxhl
Owner: Iterwheel Stack
